title: Prospectus AI Job (Platform → AI Module)
description: Stable contract for invoking the AI module. The platform module prepares inputs; the AI module writes outputs to the paths declared here.

contract_version.description: Contract version. Bump only with backward-compatible or migrated changes.

job_id.description: Opaque id for logging and result correlation.

task.description: Which AI pipeline stage to run.

absolute_path.description: Absolute filesystem path on the host running the AI module.

materials_dir.description: Issuer source files (.xlsx, .json, .docx, .pdf). Agent1 reads this directory.

agent1_output_dir.description: Required for agent2: directory produced by a prior agent1 run.

section_requirements_path.description: Platform-owned JSON: per-section drafting instructions (agent2_section_requirements.json shape).

issuer_metadata_path.description: Optional platform-owned issuer metadata JSON for conditional prompts.

kg_inputs_dir.description: Directory containing input_schema.json and input_schema_crosswalk.json for gating-doc injection.

data_manifest_path.description: Optional native-doc manifest.json under materials (Agent1 section hints).

work_dir.description: Root output directory for this job. Agent1 writes agent1 artifacts here; agent2 writes section drafts here.

result_manifest_path.description: Optional path for ai-result.json. Defaults to work_dir/ai-result.json when omitted.

model.description: LLM model id (local Qwen id or cloud model name).

sections.description: Agent2 only: section ids to generate, or omit for all.

modification_instructions.description: Agent2 only: user refinement instructions for a single-section rerun.

stream_progress.description: Emit @@AGENT2@@ SSE lines on stdout when true.

finalize_bundle.description: Agent2: write all_sections.md and output bundle artifacts.
